name: jarvis-router
description: Triage layer. Receives all incoming requests and routes to the right agent. Monitors scheduled tasks. First-pass analysis. Runs 24/7 on the always-on primary node.

triggers.incoming_request: always — this is the entry point

_tools_note: Tools listed below are declarative capability descriptions for Phase 1 planning. They are NOT implemented MCP endpoints yet. Implementation target: Phase D (The Agents). Each tool will become either an MCP call or a Queen API call.
_mcps_note: Paperclip evaluated 2026-03-11 and rejected — added complexity without needed capability. Governance handled by Queen API + Law Two (draft-then-approve). NATS provides event coordination.

mcps.name: nadirclaw
mcps.purpose: Binary prompt router — classify simple→local vs complex→cloud in ~10ms
mcps.status: planned — install via: pip install nadirclaw[dashboard] && nadirclaw --port 8856 --backend http://localhost:4000

mcps.name: nats
mcps.purpose: Event bus — publish agent actions, query recent hive activity for temporal coordination

mcps.name: queen
mcps.purpose: Node registry — check cluster health, look up capabilities, read config
